ddls:
CREATE TABLE "congress_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Congress member */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "state" TEXT /* State represented by the member */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber of Congress the member belongs to (House or Senate) */,
  "repshare" REAL /* Representativeness score */,
  "cs1" REAL /* First ideological score */,
  "cs2" REAL /* Second ideological score */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date the member's term began */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date the member's term ends */,
  "committees" TEXT /* JSON array of committees the member serves on */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the member */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the member's official photo */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing the member's contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congress_members_chamber FOREIGN KEY ("chamber") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congress_members_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_congress_members_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* General ideology of the party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the current party chairperson */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Address of the party's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the party's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's official logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "senators" TEXT /* JSON array of senators representing the state */,
  "representatives" TEXT /* JSON array of representatives representing the state */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's flag */,
  "seal_url" TEXT /* URL to the state's seal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chamber */,
  "chamber_name" TEXT /* Name of the chamber (House or Senate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chamber */,
  "presiding_officer" TEXT /* Name of the current presiding officer */,
  "vice_presiding_officer" TEXT /* Name of the current vice presiding officer */,
  "session" INTEGER /* Current session number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the current session began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the current session ends */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the chamber's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the chamber's official logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Congress member who voted */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill voted on */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., Yea, Nay, Abstain) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "vote_position" TEXT /* Position of the member in the chamber */,
  "vote_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the member's vote */,
  "vote_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES congress_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "bill_number" TEXT /* Bill number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor of the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the bill */,
  "full_text_url" TEXT /* URL to the full text of the bill */,
  "amendments" TEXT /* JSON array of amendments to the bill */,
  "related_bills" TEXT /* JSON array of related bills */,
  "committees" TEXT /* JSON array of committees that have reviewed the bill */,
  "floor_debate_url" TEXT /* URL to the floor debate of the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the sponsor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State represented by the sponsor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the sponsor */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's official photo */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing the sponsor's contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote result */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill voted on */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Outcome of the vote (Passed or Failed) */,
  "majority" INTEGER /* Majority required for the bill to pass */,
  "yea_votes" INTEGER /* Number of 'Yea' votes */,
  "nay_votes" INTEGER /* Number of 'Nay' votes */,
  "abstain_votes" INTEGER /* Number of 'Abstain' votes */,
  "vetoed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bill was vetoed */,
  "override_vote" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there was an override vote */,
  "override_result" TEXT /* Result of the override vote (Passed or Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_results_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituents" (
  "constituent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituent */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Congress member the constituent belongs to */,
  "constituent_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituent */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the constituent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the constituent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the constituent */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the constituent */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the constituent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the constituent */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the constituent */,
  "political_leanings" TEXT /* Political leanings of the constituent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituents_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES congress_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lobbyists" (
  "lobbyist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lobbyist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lobbyist */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the lobbyist represents */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Congress member the lobbyist interacted with */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the interaction */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the lobbyist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the lobbyist's official photo */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing the lobbyist's contact information */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the lobbyist registered to lobby */,
  "lobbying_expenses" REAL /* Annual lobbying expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lobbyist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lobbyists_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES congress_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_finance" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Congress member receiving the donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., individual, PAC, corporate) */,
  "donation_source" TEXT /* Source of the donation (e.g., personal, organization) */,
  "donation_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the donation (e.g., campaign, travel, meals) */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Period during which the donation was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_finance_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_finance_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES congress_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the donor belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the donor */,
  "lobbyist" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the donor is a registered lobbyist */,
  "lobbying_expenses" REAL /* Annual lobbying expenses (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)
